title: Week 3 Canvas Completion Check
description: Formative assessment to ensure rookies have completed FEC blocks 4-6 and are ready for Week 4 pitch preparation.

indicators: Pricing model is specified (commission, fee, hybrid, etc.)
Cost structure includes both fixed and variable costs
Financial projections are present and realistic
Key resources are identified beyond just the founder
Key partners are named with mutual value exchange described
Partner relationships are strategic, not just transactional
UVP clearly articulates target customer and problem solved

rubric.description: All three blocks are complete, realistic, and well-integrated with Week 2 foundation. Ready for Stage Gate 1.
rubric.feedback: Your FEC is ready for pitch development. Focus on storytelling and presentation in Week 4.

rubric.description: Blocks are complete with minor gaps or unclear areas. Some refinement needed before pitch.
rubric.feedback: Strong foundation. Strengthen [specific block] before Week 4 pitch preparation.

rubric.description: One or more blocks are incomplete or unrealistic. Significant refinement needed.
rubric.feedback: Schedule 1-on-1 with coach/mentor to address gaps in [specific blocks] before proceeding to Week 4.

rubric.description: Multiple blocks are missing or lack substance. Not ready for Week 4 without intervention.
rubric.feedback: Your canvas needs significant work. Complete the canvas wizard and schedule coaching before advancing.

coachReview: Coaches should review submitted canvases within 48 hours and provide feedback via the coach dashboard. Flag rookies at 'Developing' or 'Beginning' for intervention before Week 4.
retryPolicy: Rookies receiving 'Developing' or 'Beginning' should revise their canvas before Week 4. Provide async feedback and schedule check-in.
